item.title: How Much Are Dog Shots?
item.description: Learn more about the price of dog vaccinations.

item.title: How to Outsmart Market Anxiety When Everyone Else Is Panicking
item.description: Take a breath and follow these four steps.

item.title: Will You Get a Tariff Refund After the Supreme Court Ruling?
item.description: "The American people paid for these tariffs and the American people should get their money back," Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., wrote on X Friday.

item.title: Home Equity Sharing: Pros and Cons
item.description: Get valuable insight into the pros and cons of home equity sharing so that you can decide if it’s the right funding option for you.

item.title: Here Are the Federal Income Tax Brackets for This Year
item.description: Tax brackets dictate how much you'll pay on each portion of your taxable income for the year.
